titlStmt.titl: DDI description: Newspaper Articles about Hossa National Park and Evo Hiking Area: List of Works 2012-2023
titlStmt.parTitl: DDI-kuvailu: Hossan kansallispuistoa ja Evon retkeilyaluetta koskevat sanomalehtikirjoitukset: teosluettelo 2012-2023

citation.biblCit: Newspaper Articles about Hossa National Park and Evo Hiking Area: List of Works 2012-2023 [metadata]. Metadata version 1.0.0 (2024-05-07). Finnish Social Science Data Archive [producer and distributor]. DOI: https://doi.org/10.60686/t-fsd3847; URN: https://urn.fi/urn:nbn:fi:fsd:T-FSD3847

holdings.location: Finnish Social Science Data Archive FSD

docDscr.notes: FSD:n aineistokuvailut (FSD metadata records), joiden tekijä on Suomen yhteiskuntatieteellinen tietoarkisto (Finnish Social Science Data Archive), on lisensoitu Creative Commons 1.0 Yleismaailmallinen (CC0 1.0) -lisenssillä.

FSD:n aineistokuvailut (FSD metadata records) by Suomen yhteiskuntatieteellinen tietoarkisto (Finnish Social Science Data Archive) are licensed under a Creative Commons 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) license.

titlStmt.titl: Newspaper Articles about Hossa National Park and Evo Hiking Area: List of Works 2012-2023
titlStmt.parTitl: Hossan kansallispuistoa ja Evon retkeilyaluetta koskevat sanomalehtikirjoitukset: teosluettelo 2012-2023

prodStmt.copyright: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.

serInfo.p: Individual datasets that do not belong to any series.

citation.biblCit: Mikkonen, Jukka (National Library of Finland): Newspaper Articles about Hossa National Park and Evo Hiking Area: List of Works 2012-2023 [dataset]. Data version 1.0 (2024-03-26). Finnish Social Science Data Archive [distributor]. DOI: https://doi.org/10.60686/t-fsd3847; URN: https://urn.fi/urn:nbn:fi:fsd:T-FSD3847

holdings.location: Finnish Social Science Data Archive FSD

abstract.p: The material includes a list of newspaper articles, which contains information on the Hossa National Park and the Evo Hiking Area.

The list of articles contains the chronologically ordered reference data: the code by which the article is referred to in the research, the name of the author of the article, the title of the article, the title of the publication, the date of the publication, the page number of the article, the type of text (editorial, news, column), the ISSN of the publication, the online address of the article in the National Library's Digi-service (page of the publication), the national park covered in the article and any comment by the researcher on the newspaper or article. The data does not include listed articles, only the above information related to them.
The data was collected in a researcher residency pilot funded by the Mikkeli University Centre.

sumDscr.universe: Newspaper articles about Hossa National Park and the Evo Hiking Area

sampProc.p: The catalogue of articles has been compiled with word searches from the National Library's Digi-service.

dataColl.resInstru: Data collection guidelines: Secondary data collection guide DataCollectionGuidelines.SecondaryDataCollectionGuide

method.stdyClas: Study description in Finnish and English. The data files are generally not processed and are retained in the form they were delivered in by the researcher. If necessary, the archive anonymises the data.

useStmt.restrctn: The dataset is (A) openly available for all users without registration (CC BY 4.0).
useStmt.citReq: The data and its creators shall be cited in all publications and presentations for which the data have been used. The bibliographic citation may be in the form suggested by the archive or in the form required by the publication.
useStmt.deposReq: Notify FSD of all publications where you have used the data by sending the citation information to user-services.fsd@tuni.fi.
useStmt.disclaimer: The original data creators and the archive bear no responsibility for any results or interpretations arising from the reuse of the data.

othrStdyMat.relPubl:
Mikkonen, J. (2024). Korpimaiden kauneudet: esteettiset kokemukset Hossan kansallispuistoa ja Evon retkeilyaluetta koskevissa sanomalehtikirjoituksissa 2016-2022. Alue ja ympäristö 53(1).
Korpimaiden kauneudet: esteettiset kokemukset Hossan kansallispuistoa ja Evon retkeilyaluetta koskevissa sanomalehtikirjoituksissa 2016-2022 DOI:10.30663/ay.131801
